name: Jamnagar (RIL)
description: The world's largest refining complex, highly complex and optimized for heavy/sour crudes but fully capable of processing sweet crudes.

name: Vadinar (Nayara)
description: High-complexity refinery, optimized for heavy/sour crudes, can handle sweet spot crudes.

name: Paradip (IOCL)
description: State-of-the-art public sector refinery on the east coast, highly complex, processes sour and heavy grades.

name: Kochi (BPCL)
description: Medium-complexity refinery, optimized for Middle East sour crude but routinely processes sweet grades.

name: Digboi (IOCL)
description: India's oldest refinery, processes only domestic sweet crude from Assam. Incompatible with sour grades.
